CustomField.description: Auto calculated field that reflects the status of the option:Exercised(if the Exercise Date is entered),Not Started or Expired(if Today is not in range of the Option Start/End dates),or Available(can be exercised Today)
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL(leaseworks__Exercised_Date__c)),"Exercised", IF( leaseworks__Option_Notice_Start__c > TODAY(),"Not Started", IF ( leaseworks__Option_Notice_End__c < TODAY(), "Expired","Available")))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto calculated field that reflects the status of the option:Exercised(if the Exercise Date is entered),Not Started or Expired(if Today is not in range of the Option Start/End dates),or Available(can be exercised Today)
CustomField.label: Status
